completion_criteria: Current kernel baseline is documented
Unstructured 0.22.28 gap is documented without runtime change
PackageManifest, it-stream, destination, and Base boundaries are documented
deliverables: P6K scope, roadmap, non-goal, and execution-plan docs
Gap audit tools and validation JSON outputs
milestones.objective: Freeze the current Zephyr-dev kernel baseline and the next-step hardening plan.
milestones.risk: Audit can drift if later milestones change implementation without updating the frozen baseline.
milestones.title: Baseline Audit

completion_criteria: Selective enhanced profiles work
Governance metadata is preserved
Base regression boundary remains intact
deliverables: CLI flags for enhanced partition parameters
milestones.objective: Upgrade to unstructured 0.22.28 and add selective enhanced partition profiles.
milestones.risk: Version and metadata-shape drift can regress Base bundle compatibility if not bounded.
milestones.title: Unstructured 0.22.28 Enhanced Partition Profile

completion_criteria: Artifact identity collision risk is removed
Destination mapping can consume package-aware descriptors
milestones.objective: Add package-aware artifact identity without changing commercial boundaries.
milestones.risk: Artifact layout changes can break replay and Base compatibility if wrapper paths are not preserved.
milestones.title: PackageManifestV1 / package_id / artifact descriptors

completion_criteria: Expected element classes appear
Metadata richness improves on target samples
non_goals: No new runtime surface beyond M1
milestones.objective: Benchmark enhanced partition behavior against planned Chinese invoice and contract samples.
milestones.risk: Sample variance can hide regressions if evidence is not normalized.
milestones.title: Partitioner enhanced profiles real benchmark

completion_criteria: Airbyte-like subset is explicit
No uncontrolled runtime expansion occurs
milestones.objective: Add bounded Airbyte-like structured sync semantics on the existing it-stream path.
milestones.risk: Broadening into consumer-group or platform semantics would violate current it-stream boundaries.
milestones.title: it-stream Airbyte-like structured sync hardening

completion_criteria: Each retained destination has a package-aware mapping plan
Replay and delivery contracts remain bounded
milestones.objective: Map future package-aware artifacts into retained destinations.
milestones.risk: Destination schema churn can fragment replay and inspection surfaces.
milestones.title: Package-aware destination mapping

completion_criteria: HTML node is bounded and package-aware
milestones.objective: Add an internal HTML composition node after package-aware artifacts exist.
milestones.risk: HTML behavior can blur kernel vs product boundaries if surfaced too early.
milestones.title: HTML Composer Node

completion_criteria: Chunk artifacts are package-aware and replay-safe
milestones.objective: Add typed chunk artifacts for downstream embed/search work.
milestones.risk: Chunk identity drift can multiply collision and replay complexity.
milestones.title: Chunker Node + ZephyrChunk

completion_criteria: Embeddings are typed, package-aware, and optional
non_goals: No Pro billing or quota logic
milestones.objective: Add core embedding provider abstractions without commercial gating.
milestones.risk: Heavy dependency and model-surface creep can violate Base non-regression boundaries.
milestones.title: Embedder Node + EmbeddingProvider

completion_criteria: Workflow execution remains bounded and replayable
milestones.objective: Introduce the minimum workflow runtime after node and package primitives exist.
milestones.risk: Runtime expansion can reopen orchestration boundaries if introduced before package identity is stable.
milestones.title: Batch Workflow Runtime minimum

completion_criteria: Kernel surfaces are stable and product-facing layers remain external
non_goals: No Web-core entitlement or billing in Zephyr-dev
milestones.objective: Expose the hardened kernel to future Pro/Web product layers without commercial logic in Zephyr-dev.
milestones.risk: Surface leakage can collapse kernel and commercial boundaries.
milestones.title: Pro/Web SDK/API surface

completion_criteria: Benchmark evidence is reproducible and versioned
milestones.objective: Expand benchmark coverage with Chinese-focused document samples and evidence capture.
milestones.risk: Benchmark sprawl can turn into a hidden runtime contract if not scoped.
milestones.title: Chinese benchmark suite

completion_criteria: Provider layer is typed, optional, and non-commercial
milestones.objective: Add bounded AI extraction provider contracts after workflow primitives exist.
milestones.risk: Model-provider coupling can leak product policy into the kernel.
milestones.title: LLMProvider / Extract / NER / Table Description

completion_criteria: Fallback remains experimental and optional
milestones.objective: Run a bounded OCR fallback experiment without changing the default runtime path.
milestones.risk: Experimental OCR can silently broaden dependency and runtime surfaces.
milestones.title: DeepSeek-OCR2 fallback experiment

completion_criteria: Feishu sources fit existing flow ownership rules
milestones.objective: Add bounded Feishu document and structured sources after prior kernel layers are ready.
milestones.risk: Feishu source breadth can blur structured vs document flow boundaries.
milestones.title: Feishu UNS + IT sources
